CustomField.formula: CASE(CASE( MOD(Date__c - DATE(1900, 1, 7), 7), 0, "Sunday", 1, "Monday", 2, "Tuesday", 3, "Wednesday", 4, "Thursday", 5, "Friday", 6, "Saturday","ERROR"), "Sunday", Date__c + 5, "Monday", Date__c + 4, "Tuesday", Date__c + 3, "Wednesday", Date__c + 2, "Thursday", Date__c + 1, "Friday", Date__c, "Saturday", Date__c + 6, null)
CustomField.label: Room Date
